*Signals*
• *[CRITICAL]* Day 4 of complete traffic blackout
  *What:* 0 sessions, 0 users, 0 page views on 2026-06-23. Same weekday last week (2026-06-16) also shows 0 in the sheet. Top Pages and Referral Sources tabs are empty. All key pages (/, /brands, /brands/[slug], /category/*) returned 0 views.
  *So what:* Formoria has had zero measurable traffic for at least 4 consecutive days. This points to a GA4 tag failure, site outage, or data pipeline issue continuing unresolved.
  *Now what:* Verify site is live at formoria.com; confirm GA4 tag fires on page load; check Apps Script logs for errors. Resolve via existing ticket DEV-879.

*Ticket Status*
